retry_reason: If the pointer is NULL, the operation is a no-op; retrying will not change this. If non-NULL, the put succeeds and the object must not be used again, so retrying would cause a double-release (use-after-free).
contract_summary: This function releases one reference on a reference-counted object identified by a common ref header. It must be called when the caller is done using the underlying object (rawdata, proxy, or namespace). After this call, the caller must not access the object again. The function handles NULL gracefully by doing nothing. It selects the correct put function based on the stored reftype.
